import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
tree = ET.parse\('documentosuteis/AG31'\)
root = tree.getroot\(\)
campos = root.find\('CAMPOS'\)
print\('=== SICREDI \(XML\) - todos os campos ==='\)
for elem in campos:
    if elem.tag != 'FASES' and elem.text is not None:
        print\(f'  {elem.tag} = {elem.text.strip\(\)}'\)
print\(f'\\nTotal: {sum\(1 for e in campos if e.tag != \\"FASES\\" and e.text is not None\)} campos'\)
")
